reason: Real legal/privacy specifics, justified ordering, concrete exit check.
Specific costly local rules, clear hard-rule/taste boundary, checkable exit.
Concrete non-default style rules (case, alignment, split) plus exit check.
Precise format spec, honest prose-vs-script tradeoff, concrete exit checklist.
Non-obvious API semantics, handler rules, verifiable staging-replay exit criterion.
Heavy process justified by irreversibility; dry-run/archive/sign-off/verify all load-bearing.
Strict never-reorder debugging sequence asserted, but justification is thin/pretextual.
3 reviewers, memo, screenshots, 24h cooling period even for typo fixes.
Mechanical rule correctly shipped as authoritative executable verifier script.
Judgment-based soundness faked via regex/keyword/word-count script, easily gamed.
Concrete required fields, real failure modes named, grep-based exit check.
Quality section is vague truisms ('inspiring', 'feel right'), no real guidance.
